name: Zite
description: Zite database and records platform (by Fillout). Create, find, update, and manage records across tables in your Zite databases.

credential_fields.name: token
credential_fields.label: Api Key
credential_fields.description: Zite/Fillout API key (generate from your Zite dashboard)

tools.name: find_records
tools.description: Query and retrieve records from a Zite database table. Supports filtering, sorting, pagination, and field selection. Returns an array of matching records with their field values. Use limit and offset for pagination through large result sets.

databaseId.description: The unique ID of the Zite database.

tableId.description: The unique ID of the table within the database.

limit.description: Maximum number of records to return. Defaults to 50.

offset.description: Number of records to skip for pagination. Defaults to 0.

filters.description: JSON-encoded filter criteria to narrow results (e.g. '{"fieldName": {"eq": "value"}}').

fields.description: Comma-separated list of field names to include in the response. If omitted, all fields are returned.

tools.name: add_record
tools.description: Create a new record in a Zite database table. Provide the field values as key-value pairs in the fields object. Returns the newly created record with its assigned ID and all field values.

databaseId.description: The unique ID of the Zite database.

tableId.description: The unique ID of the table within the database.

fields.description: Key-value pairs of field names to values for the new record. Supports text, numbers, dates, booleans, and other Zite field types.

tools.name: update_record
tools.description: Update an existing record in a Zite database table. Provide the record ID and the field values to update. Only the specified fields will be modified; other fields remain unchanged. Returns the updated record.

databaseId.description: The unique ID of the Zite database.

tableId.description: The unique ID of the table within the database.

recordId.description: The unique ID of the record to update.

fields.description: Key-value pairs of field names to updated values. Only the specified fields will be modified.

tools.name: upsert_record
tools.description: Insert a new record or update an existing one in a Zite database table (upsert). If a record matching the provided match fields already exists, it will be updated; otherwise a new record is created. Returns the created or updated record.

databaseId.description: The unique ID of the Zite database.

tableId.description: The unique ID of the table within the database.

fields.description: Key-value pairs of field names to values. These will be set on the created or updated record.

matchFields.description: List of field names to use for matching an existing record. If a record with matching values in these fields exists, it will be updated instead of creating a new one.
